unit.name: UState
unit.summary: Defines core data types and classes for representing state variables, parameters, and external variables in a crop simulation model. Provides a standardized way to handle variables that change over time (states), fixed model parameters, and variables imported from other modules or the environment.

item.info: Type or class for state variables (e.g., leaf area, biomass) updated during simulation.
Types or classes for model parameters (constants or tunable values).
Types or classes for external variables (inputs from other modules, weather, soil, etc.).
Type for model options or switches (e.g., to enable/disable certain processes).
General-purpose variable type, often for intermediate or calculated values.

devnotes.summary: Enumeration type for pointers, important for external state variables and external values where the name of a state variable can refer to the state or its rate of change.
THumeEntity is the base class for all objects representing either numerical values (states, variables, parameters, constants) or options.
devnotes.remarks: Provides basic functionality for variables (parameters, state variables) and external "driving forces". If the destination is a console app it derives from TObject; otherwise it derives from TPersistent for IDE/GUI use.

devnotes.summary: Name field.
Field for comments/explanation.
Private field for the name of the Entity.
Field submodel to which the Entity belongs.
Field documentation link.
Units of the entity.
Indicates if the entity is indexed (array).
Lower bound for indexed entities.
Upper bound for indexed entities.
Flag for initialisation from file.
Flag for output to text file.
Flag for output to Ini file.
Flag for selection for output.
Flag for initialisation from file; false indicates need for alternative initialisation.
Name of the object.
Name of the submodule.
Comment or description.
DocuWebLink.
Flag indicating whether to write output to a text file.
Flag indicating selection for sensitivity analysis output.
Units associated with the object.
TOption is a class representing an option with a string value and a list of possible options.
The private field for the option string.
Getter for the option string.
Setter for the option string.
Default string/option for the option.
A list of possible options.
Initializes the option with a name, default value, and comment.
Property to access the option string.
THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: Number of digits.
Number of digits after the decimal separator.
Getter for the numerical value.
Setter for the numerical value.
Private field with numerical value of the entity.
Units of the numerical value.
Default value for parameters or states (initial value).
Flag for graphical output.
Flag for selection to global output file.
Flag for extra output of final values in file.
Flag indicating if measured data are available.
Writes the declaration code for the entity into a source code file.
Writes the property code for the entity into a source code file.
Writes the creation code for the entity into a source code file.
Property for optional plotting to graph.
Property for the optional output of final values.
Property for the digits used in output.
Property for the precision of the numerical value.
Property for the flag indicating if the entity is written to a global output file.
Property for the numerical value of the entity.
TVar is a class representing a variable, i.e. a value that can be calculated for each time step in the model from other variables, state variables or parameters.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeNumEntity and provides methods for automatic source code generation for initialization and rate calculation.

devnotes.summary: String containing source code for rate calculation.
String containing source code for initialization.
Instantiates a variable object.
TPar is a class representing a parameter variable in the model, which can be selected for optimization or sensitivity analysis.
devnotes.remarks: Extends TVar and adds properties for maximum and minimum expected values, error, and selection flags.

devnotes.summary: Maximum expected value (added 12.01.05 for GA optimisation).
Minimum expected value.
Selected for optimization?
Selected for sensitivity analysis?
Uncertainty value.
Instantiates a parameter object.
Property for selection for sensitivity analysis.
TState is a class representing a state variable in the model, which has an initial value and a rate of change.
devnotes.remarks: Extends TVar and provides a constructor for creating state variables with initial value, change rate, and comment.

devnotes.summary: Initial value.
Change rate of state variable.
Instantiates a state variable object.
TExternV is a class representing an external variable in the model. Values of model elements outside a submodel are called "external variables" and can be accessed via pointers.
devnotes.remarks: The default method for setting the link to the external variable is to search for it in the model by its name. Extends THumeNumEntity and provides methods for getting and setting the value, as well as creating the external variable with a name, units, and an external value type.

devnotes.summary: Indicates if the external variable is searched for in the model. If not, it is assumed to be set by connecting two submodels by a direct link.
External value type.
Conversion factor.
Source of the external variable, e.g. a file or a submodel.
Getter for the numerical value of the external variable.
Setter for the numerical value of the external variable.
Instantiates an external variable object.
Set pointer of the "value" variable.
Type of external value.
Flag indicating if the external variable is searched for in the model.
Conversion factor.
Source of the external variable.
